__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — frozen citation, not live data

claim.property: activation energy (acid hydrolysis of PET ester bond)
claim.condition: acidic conditions, 85 C; first-order kinetics on ester bond cleavage

source.primary: Marshall I.A., Petrov A.A. & Kalinin A.M. (1988) — PET hydrolysis kinetics study
source.secondary: Toray PET film datasheet thermal-aging accelerated-test method; Sammon 2000 polym deg. stab.
source.citation: Marshall et al. 1988 + Toray PET datasheet — PET ester-bond hydrolysis Ea 75-100 kJ/mol

tolerance.basis: literature spread depending on acid concentration / temperature window; spec range must overlap published 75-100 kJ/mol band within ± 10 kJ/mol on each endpoint

spec_doc.line_hint: §4.1 ester linkage block: 'activation energy E_a ≈ 80-100 kJ/mol (Marshall et al. 1988)'
